name: chip
description: Interactive filter chip with filled and outline variants, selected state, leading icon, and optional remove button.

props.name: label
props.description: Text label displayed inside the chip

props.name: variant
props.description: Visual style variant of the chip

props.name: selected
props.description: Whether the chip is in a selected/active state

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables press interaction and applies disabled styling

props.name: icon
props.description: Optional icon rendered before the label

props.name: onRemove
props.description: If provided, shows a remove (×) button and calls this handler when pressed

examples.label: Example 1
Example 3
examples.code:
// Chip with icon
<Chip label="Starred" icon={<StarIcon />} variant="outline" />

examples.label: Example 4
examples.code:
// Disabled chip that cannot be interacted with
<Chip label="Unavailable" disabled />
